message:
chore(beads): close gt1c, zh8o, 55et - verified complete implementations

Verified and closed three stale in_progress beads with complete
implementations that were never closed by their original assignees:

- asupersync-gt1c: VirtualTimerWheel (12 unit tests, all 5 criteria)
- asupersync-zh8o: LZ4 trace compression (6 tests, all 5 criteria)
- asupersync-55et: Recording limits/degradation (all 6 criteria)

Unblocks asupersync-263w (Hierarchical Timer Wheel epic).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
